childhood.familyBackground: Miguel Gellert Krigsner is a Bolivian-Brazilian entrepreneur. He is the founder of the Brazilian company O Boticário, the second major cosmetic company in the Southern Hemisphere.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 미겔 겔레르트 크릭스너(Miguel Gellert Krigsner)는 볼리비아계 브라질 기업가이다. 그는 남반구에서 두 번째로 큰 화장품 회사인 브라질 기업 오 보티카리오(O Boticário)의 창업자이다.
childhood.education: Details of Miguel Krigsner's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Miguel Krigsner의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: Miguel Krigsner built a career in Cosmetics.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Miguel Krigsner은(는) Cosmetics 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.

careerTimeline.event: Established presence in fashion & retail industry
Became a major figure in Cosmetics

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic impacted business operations globally
failures.descriptionKo: 코로나19 팬데믹이 전 세계적으로 사업 운영에 영향
failures.lesson: Resilience and adaptability are essential in times of crisis

personalTraits.knownFor: Building wealth through Cosmetics. Net worth $6.8B.
